evals.expected_output: CLAUDE.md updated with Owner section (English labels); onboarding.json set to status: active

Owner section uses mapped label 'English' (not raw value 'en')
Owner section uses mapped label 'Balanced' (not raw value 'balanced')
onboarding.json status is 'active' and appliedAt field is present

evals.prompt: プロフィールを反映して

Owner section uses 'Guided (confirm each step)' for Autonomy
onboarding.json status is 'active' and appliedAt field is present

evals.expected_output: Skill stops immediately with error message about incomplete profile. No changes to CLAUDE.md. onboarding.json unchanged.

assertions.text: Response contains an error message about incomplete profile / onboarding not done
CLAUDE.md is NOT modified (no ## Owner section added)
